ddls:
CREATE TABLE "precipitation_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each precipitation record */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "lon" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data collection */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Amount of precipitation measured */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of data collection */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of data collection */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day of data collection */,
  "geometry" INTEGER /* Reference to the geometry record */,
  "area_km2" REAL /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "wsarea_km2" REAL /* Watershed area in square kilometers */,
  "area_weight" REAL /* Weighting factor for area calculation */,
  "id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the record */,
  "weighted_precip" REAL /* Weighted precipitation value */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the data was collected */,
  "weather_station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather station that collected the data */,
  "quality_flag" TEXT /* Quality flag indicating the data's reliability */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., satellite, ground station) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_precipitation_data_geometry FOREIGN KEY ("geometry") REFERENCES geometries ("geometry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_precipitation_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_precipitation_data_weather_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "lon" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location's significance (e.g., region name) */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the geographic region */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location */,
  "climate_zone" TEXT /* Climate zone of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geometries" (
  "geometry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geometry record */,
  "geometry_type" TEXT /* Type of geometric shape (e.g., POLYGON, POINT) */,
  "geo_data" TEXT /* The actual geometric data */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the geographic region */,
  "area_type" TEXT /* Type of area (e.g., urban, rural, forest) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("geometry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the station is situated */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the weather station supervisor */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the station was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Operational status of the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_stations_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis record */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the precipitation data analyzed */,
  "analysis_result" TEXT /* Description of the analysis result */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was conducted */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who conducted the analysis */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used for the analysis */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Specific parameters used in the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analysis_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analysis_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES precipitation_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for system access */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the precipitation data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser and operating system) used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES precipitation_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report detailing analysis findings */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the report */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was last modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, final, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "precipitation_weights" (
  "weight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weight record */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corresponding precipitation data */,
  "weight_factor" REAL /* The weight factor used in calculations */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weight's significance */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used to calculate the weight */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the weight factor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_precipitation_weights_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES precipitation_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geographic_regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the geographic region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region's environmental characteristics */,
  "area_type" TEXT /* Type of area (e.g., urban, rural, forest) */,
  "climate_zone" TEXT /* Climate zone of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "historical_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the historical data record */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location of the historical data */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the historical data */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Total precipitation measured for that year */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes regarding the data */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the historical data (e.g., satellite, ground station) */,
  "quality_flag" TEXT /* Quality flag indicating the data's reliability */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("historical_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_system" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location of the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was issued */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., flood warning, drought warning) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message detailing the alert's significance */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "sent_to" TEXT /* Recipients of the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_system_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)
